meta.title: Train & Serve Custom Multi-modal Models - IDEFICS 2 + LLaVA Llama 3
meta.description:
➡️ Get Life-time Access to the Complete Scripts (and future improvements): https://Trelis.com/ADVANCED-vision/
➡️ One-click fine-tuning and LLM templates: https://github.com/TrelisResearch/one-click-llms
➡️ Trelis Livestreams: Thursdays 5 pm Irish time on YouTube and X.
➡️ Newsletter: https://blog.Trelis.com
➡️ Resources/Support/Discord: https://Trelis.com/About

VIDEO RESOURCES:
- IDEFICS 2 Model: https://huggingface.co/HuggingFaceM4/idefics2-8b
- IDEFICS 2 Blog: https://huggingface.co/blog/idefics2
- LLaVA Llama 3 model: https://huggingface.co/xtuner/llava-llama-3-8b-v1_1-transformers
- Chess Dataset: https://huggingface.co/datasets/Trelis/chess_pieces

TIMESTAMPS:
0:00 Fine-tuning and server setup for multi-modal models
0:41 Prerequisites (pre-watching)
1:16 IDEFICS 2 Model Overview
4:19 Model loading, evaluation and LoRA setup
14:36 Evaluating OCR performance
15:54 Evaluating multiple image inputs
23:27 Training / Fine-tuning
27:29 LLaVA Llama 3 Model Review
31:23 Multi-modal inference endpoint
35:08 VRAM Requirements for multi-modal models
37:30 IDEFICS 2 - my recommended model to build on
